description_long: This object consists of a pair of black leather ankle boots with a sleek, polished finish. The boots have a slightly pointed toe and a low, block heel, giving them a formal yet versatile appearance suitable for urban environments. The upper material appears smooth and well-crafted, with subtle stitching details visible along the sides and around the toe box. The boots do not feature visible laces or straps, suggesting a slip-on or side-zip design. The soles are robust and slightly raised, likely made of durable rubber for traction on city surfaces. Overall, the boots are in excellent condition, showing no signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of black, polished leather ankle boots with a low block heel and smooth, slip-on design. The boots are sleek, formal, and in excellent condition.
description_view_0: Front and side view of the boots, highlighting the pointed toe and smooth upper surface.
description_view_1: Side and rear view, showing the low block heel and the clean, unadorned back of the boots.
description_view_2: Top and angled view, emphasizing the slip-on opening and the overall sleek shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side and rear view, displaying the heel and the continuous, polished leather surface.
